onboarding.title: Paste Blog URL
onboarding.description: Copy and paste a Naver Blog URL (get it from the share button in Naver Blog)

onboarding.title: Get All Photos
onboarding.description: Tap the button to start downloading

onboarding.title: Download & Save
onboarding.description: Save individual or all photos to your photo library

onboarding.title: Browse Photos
onboarding.description: Swipe through photos in immersive view

whatsNew.title: Custom App Icon
whatsNew.description: Switch between "Default" and "New" app icons in Settings to personalize your home screen style

whatsNew.title: Two View Modes
whatsNew.description: Swipe view and grid view are available — choose your preferred way to browse photos
